characters.description: "Forgot My Hat" GuyCharacter InformationGenderMale ♂Hair ColorBaldBehind the ScenesFirst appearance"Selma's Choice"  The"forgot my hat" guyis a man who, along with a large crowd, attendedGladys Bouvier's funeral simply to see whether the crowd might be able to get any money from her. Like the others, he left upon finding out that Gladys wasn't wealthy, but he briefly returned to retrieve the hat he had left in the room.

characters.name: 'N Sync (character)
characters.description: 'N SyncBand InformationGenrePopMembersJC ChasezJustin TimberlakeLance BassJoey FatoneChris KirkpatrickFirst appearance"New Kids on the Blecch" 'N Syncwas an American pop band formed in Orlando in 1995. After their concert,Party Possewinded down. Suddenly, 'N Sync walked in with the accompaniment of dance-pop music that magically comes from nowhere. They congratulated Party Posse and even gave them a wicked gift basket. After learning that their clothes were getting a little out of date, 'N Sync left to buy new clothes. Party Posse then decided to send them a basket, too.

characters.name: Aging of characters in The Simpsons
characters.description: Theaging of characters in The Simpsonshas been a subject of common fan debate. The passage of time is clear, but characters only show minor, if any, signs of aging, despite openly saying thatyearshave passed. The children also remain in the same grades at school. The writers and character designs seem to ignore the issue of aging. One common theory is that, like in many cartoons, the characters never age and are trapped at the age of their first appearance. However,Homer,Bart,Lisa,MargeandMaggiehave all had episodes involving their birthdays. Another common theory is that, because only one half-hour episode airs approximately each week, the flow of time in The Simpsons is considerably slower than in real life. This theory is supported by the apparent, though minimal, growth of the characters, as well as the noted marks of time. However, this causes a problem with episodes such asAll's Fair in Oven War, when the kitchen takes two years (in the Simpsons-verse) to remodel, but no-one has aged.

characters.name: 50 Cent (character)
characters.description: Curtis James Jackson IIICharacter InformationGenderMale ♂StatusAliveHair ColorBlackOccupationRapper, actor, entrepreneur, executive producerBehind the ScenesFirst appearancePranksta RapVoiced byHimself  Curtis James Jackson III, better known by his stage name50 Cent, is a very famous rapper in real life who voices himself in a short cameo.Bartencounters him while inAlcatraaz's Hummer H1 limo, while 50 Cent is next to them in agoldenHummer H1 limo. He tells Bart to stay in school and "The more you know, the further you go." He then asks an accomplice (either court-ordered or a legal assistant) if the comment counts for community service, is disappointed and then driven to a park to pick up dog poop.

characters.name: Aaron Burr
characters.description: Aaron BurrCharacter InformationGenderMale ♂StatusDeceasedBehind the ScenesFirst appearance'Tis the 30th Season  Aaron Burr Jr.(February 6, 1756 – September 14, 1836) was the 3rdVice President of the United States, serving underThomas Jeffersonduring Jefferson's first term in office. In 1804 when he was Vice President he shot Alexander Hamilton in a famous duel.
